scripts.dev:all: pnpm --filter @bonusbridge/shared build && pnpm dev:api:wait && pnpm -r --parallel --filter web --filter admin dev
scripts.dev:api:wait: pnpm --filter api dev & pnpm exec wait-on -t 60000 http://localhost:3001/health
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bonusbridge/shared build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter admin build
